businessSummary.oneLiner: Government and enterprise AI data analytics platform leader with Gotham (defense), Foundry (enterprise), and AIP (AI platform)
businessSummary.description: Palantir builds AI data analytics platforms for government and enterprise. FY2025 revenue $4.48B (+56%). US commercial revenue exceeded $500M. Pentagon designated Maven AI as an official program of record for deployment across all US military branches. FY2026 guidance of $7.19B-$7.41B (+60-65%) signals growth acceleration.
howTheyMakeMoney: Enterprise AI platform (Foundry) - large enterprise data integration
AIP Boot Camps - rapid customer conversion program

keyMetrics.name: P/E (TTM)
keyMetrics.interpretation: ~10x S&P 500 average (~24x). Extreme premium but Forward P/E of 120x based on FY2026 EPS $1.34 shows rapid normalization

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: Based on FY2026 EPS $1.34. PEG of 2.48 is within high-growth stock range given 65% revenue growth

keyMetrics.name: Revenue Growth (YoY)
keyMetrics.interpretation: FY2025 revenue $4.48B. FY2026 guidance of +65% shows growth accelerating, not decelerating

keyMetrics.name: Operating Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Top-tier among software companies. Combined with 82% gross margin, demonstrates strong earnings power

keyMetrics.name: FCF Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: FCF of $2.10B. Exceptional cash generation with minimal debt ($229M)

keyMetrics.name: Cash Holdings
keyMetrics.interpretation: Net cash $6.95B ($2.90/share). Near-zero leverage financial health

keyMetrics.name: Revenue Backlog
keyMetrics.interpretation: Multi-year revenue visibility. ~2.5x current annual revenue

growthDrivers.title: Maven AI Official US Military Adoption + Stock Surges 6.78%
growthDrivers.description: Pentagon designated Maven Smart System as official program of record. PLTR surged 6.78% on the news. Long-term deployment across all military branches now confirmed

growthDrivers.title: UK FCA 3-Month Trial Contract
growthDrivers.description: UK Financial Conduct Authority hired Palantir for a 3-month Foundry trial at £30K+/week for fraud and enforcement data analysis. Signals expansion beyond defense into financial regulation

growthDrivers.title: Iran War Live AI Deployment
growthDrivers.description: NYT reported Palantir operates a system analyzing Pentagon intelligence with Anthropic AI technology. Combat-proven credentials drive future contracts

growthDrivers.title: FY2026 Revenue Guidance $7.19B-$7.41B (+60-65%)
growthDrivers.description: Management projects growth acceleration. US commercial segment emerging as key growth engine, reducing government dependency

growthDrivers.title: US Navy ShipOS $448M + Army $10B Contracts
growthDrivers.description: Major military contracts continue. $11.2B backlog provides long-term revenue visibility

growthDrivers.title: Wedbush $230 Target, 'Backbone of Military AI'
growthDrivers.description: Dan Ives maintains $230 target, calling Palantir 'the backbone of US military AI.' Pentagon's official adoption validates the thesis

competitiveAdvantage.summary: 20+ years of government defense AI track record, highest security clearances, Maven official military adoption, UK FCA trial expanding into financial regulation. Combat-proven credentials are a moat money can't buy

moats.description: Ontology platform deeply integrated into government/military systems. Replacement cost is prohibitively high
Top-level security clearances and 20+ years of government trust. Virtually impossible for new entrants to replicate
AIP Boot Camps rapidly acquire customers while Ontology data model ecosystem expands
Used for real-time targeting in Iran conflict. Combat data is the ultimate competitive advantage

competitors.name: Anduril Industries
competitors.detail: Defense AI/drone startup. Hardware-focused, more complementary than competitive with Palantir's software platform

competitors.name: Snowflake / Databricks
competitors.detail: Enterprise data platform competition. But significantly behind in government/defense access

competitors.name: Microsoft / AWS
competitors.detail: Cloud giants entering government AI. Scale advantage but lacks Palantir's deep Ontology integration

competitors.name: C3.ai
competitors.detail: Enterprise AI platform. Far behind in both revenue scale and growth rate

recentNews.headline: Pentagon Maven adoption drives PLTR +6.78% to $160.90
recentNews.significance: Deputy Secretary of Defense memo officially designating Maven as program of record was made public, triggering a 6.78% single-day surge

recentNews.headline: Iran ceasefire relief rally amplifies gains
recentNews.significance: Trump's announcement of halting Iran strikes and 'productive talks' boosted the broader market, amplifying PLTR's Maven momentum

recentNews.headline: UK FCA awards Palantir Foundry 3-month trial
recentNews.significance: UK Financial Conduct Authority hired Palantir for fraud/enforcement data analysis at £30K+/week. Signals expansion beyond defense into financial regulation

recentNews.headline: Motley Fool: 'Valuation looks absurd but there's no alternative'
recentNews.significance: Analysis arguing that despite P/E of 239x, growing number of investors consider it 'cheap' given 65% growth and monopolistic defense AI position

recentNews.headline: Silicon Valley defense AI boom, Palantir deployed in Iran conflict
recentNews.significance: NYT report. Palantir operating Anthropic AI + Pentagon intelligence analysis system. Live combat AI validation

analystOpinions.notableComment: Wedbush maintains $230 on Maven adoption, Morgan Stanley $205 Hold (increasingly bullish), UBS $200 Strong Buy. One analyst holds $70 Underperform. Today's surge narrowed consensus upside from 30% to 22%

risks.title: Extreme Valuation
risks.description: TTM P/E of 256x. Today's surge to $160.90 made the valuation even more stretched. One analyst warns of 56% downside to $70

risks.title: War-Dependent Revenue + Iran Ceasefire
risks.description: Defense revenue surged from Iran combat deployment, but Trump cited 'productive talks' with Iran. Conflict de-escalation could slow defense AI demand

risks.title: Stock Dilution
risks.description: Share count growing 4.67% YoY. Stock-based compensation continuously dilutes existing shareholders

risks.title: Government Budget Volatility
risks.description: Government shutdowns or defense budget cuts directly impact revenue. Government revenue share remains high

risks.title: Ethics/Reputation Risk
risks.description: Growing ethical criticism of AI weapons targeting systems. UK FCA contract also sparking privacy concerns

risks.title: Emerging Competition
risks.description: Microsoft, AWS entering government AI market. Limited short-term threat but requires long-term monitoring

buyReasons.title: Defense AI Monopoly, Now Officially Military-Adopted
buyReasons.rationale: Maven officially adopted as US military system. 20+ years of government trust and security clearances are irreplaceable assets

buyReasons.title: Growth Accelerating + Commercial Expansion
buyReasons.rationale: FY2025 +56% to FY2026 +65% guidance. UK FCA trial expands into financial regulation. Healthy structural shift away from government dependency

buyReasons.title: Fortress Balance Sheet
buyReasons.rationale: Cash $7.18B, debt $229M, FCF margin 47%. Strong cash generation, near-zero debt, overflowing cash reserves

buyReasons.title: $11.2B Backlog Ensures Revenue Visibility
buyReasons.rationale: Backlog at 2.5x annual revenue. Multi-year stable revenue growth assured

buyReasons.title: Wall Street Targets Rising
buyReasons.rationale: Consensus $196 (+22%). Wedbush $230, Morgan Stanley $205, UBS $200. Major brokerages raising targets in succession

overallOpinion: Maven AI's official US military adoption triggered a 6.78% single-day surge. Combined with the Iran ceasefire relief rally, PLTR closed at $160.90, breaking above its 50-day moving average ($152)
The UK FCA trial is a significant signal of expansion beyond defense. Moving into financial regulation and fraud detection expands the addressable market considerably
Broke above 50-day but 200-day ($163) resistance is just overhead. RSI 55 indicates room to run. Fundamentals are the strongest ever, but P/E of 256x remains a risk. Accumulate on pullbacks

investmentVerdict.summary: Maven official adoption, UK FCA expansion, and +65% growth acceleration make fundamentals the strongest ever. P/E 256x and potential Iran de-escalation are risks, but Palantir's irreplaceable defense AI monopoly warrants accumulation on pullbacks.

sources.name: New York Times
sources.description: Palantir Iran combat AI deployment report

sources.name: Quiver Quantitative
sources.description: FCA trial reinforces government demand narrative

x.hook: Pentagon officially adopts Maven. PLTR surges 6.78%
x.text:
$PLTR (Mar 24) Pentagon designates Maven AI as official military system. Stock surges 6.78% to $160.90. UK FCA trial adds to the momentum.

1/4
thread:
+65% growth, $11.2B backlog, 47% FCF margin. Fundamentals are best-in-class AI. Broke above 50-day MA.

2/4

Risks: P/E 256x and Iran ceasefire could slow defense AI demand. But there's no alternative in this space.

3/4

200-day ($163) is next resistance. RSI 55 neutral. Consensus $196 (+22%). Accumulate on pullbacks.

4/4

threads.hook: Pentagon Maven adoption + UK FCA expansion = +6.78%
threads.text:
$PLTR (Mar 24) $160.90 (+6.78%)

Pentagon officially adopted Maven AI. UK FCA started a Foundry trial for fraud detection. Iran ceasefire rally amplified gains.

+65% growth, $11.2B backlog, 47% FCF margin. Broke above 50-day MA. Expanding beyond defense into financial regulation.

P/E 256x is the elephant in the room, but there's no alternative. Consensus $196 (+22%). Accumulate on dips.

witty.text:

1/4
thread:
UK FCA joined too. From targeting enemies to catching fraudsters. The customer list keeps getting scarier.

2/4
